official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

model_v3.note: shadow A/B — does not drive picks

pick_team.label: Normal
pick_team.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
pick_team.score_reason: Normal (4.7/10): 5 recent relief innings, recency-weighted (2 days since last game), 1 arm worked back-to-back days. Recent innings count more; rest days lower the score. Workload only — see efficiency for how well the pen has pitched.
pick_team.formula: 45 + (recency-weighted (BP IP - 3/game) x 4.2) + (recency-weighted back-to-back arms x 8). Each game decays by half every 2 days, so rest days lower the score.

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

pick_team.efficiency_reason: Below average (3.6/10): 7.2 ERA and 1.2 WHIP over 5 relief innings (4 ER, 4 H, 2 BB) in the last three days.
pick_team.efficiency_formula: 50 - clamp((ERA - 4.20) x 6, -25, 25) x confidence - clamp((WHIP - 1.30) x 15, -20, 20) x confidence, confidence = clamp(BP IP / 6, 0.35, 1)
